india.summary: Israeli forces reportedly established a temporary base on an old airstrip in Iraq's Najaf desert during the war against Iran, according to security officials. The operation, coordinated with the US, led to clashes with Iraqi troops. While no forces remain, equipment may have been left behind. Iraq had previously protested an air raid in the area.

india.title: Non-binary Indian on student visa elected to Scottish Parliament
india.summary: A non-binary transgender Indian national, Q Manivannan, has been elected as a Member of the Scottish Parliament (MSP) on a student visa. This historic win marks the first time a foreign citizen without permanent residency has held such a position. Manivannan's election has drawn controversy, with debates arising over their immigration status and political stance.

technology.title: Realme Buds T500 Pro Review: Pocket-Friendly
technology.summary: The Realme Buds T500 Pro comes loaded with interesting features and benefits. The earbuds feature 12.4mm drivers for high-quality sound. The earbuds also support active noise cancellation up to 40 dB of noise reduction. It has an IP55 rating, making it dust- and splash-resistant. It also comes with up to 56 hours of battery life with the case, while the earbuds deliver up to 8 hours of backup without ANC. The charging is as fast as well, and you get 2 hours of music playback with 10 minutes of quick charge.
